summary: Re-tested FIX 4 (SectionTitle fix) and FIX 2 (canvas right-click shape) plus regression smoke for the Mind-Mapper Studio (/app?unlock=mind-mapper67). FIX 4 CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED — SelectionPropertiesPanel now renders the Line-properties inspector without any ReferenceError; all expected connector testids exist in DOM (studio-selection-panel, studio-conn-color-{00f0ff,8a5bff,ff6ad5,ffb547,3ddc84,cfe0ff}, studio-conn-width-{1,1.6,2.5,4}, studio-conn-arrow-{on,off}). The local SectionTitle component at /app/frontend/src/components/SelectionPropertiesPanel.jsx lines 8-12 resolves the bug. FIX 2 VERIFIED — right-click on empty canvas shows mm-canvas-ctx-shape and clicking it creates an annotation with testid mm-annot-shape-annot_* on the canvas. Regression smoke PASS — mm-top-toolbar-wrap default pos is exactly {x:290, y:145}, btn-open-output has no amber classes, map-close-btn navigates to /library. mm-ctx-add-count was not observed on the root node's ctx menu in this run (that node shows a simpler Edit/Duplicate/Delete menu), but iter_53 already visually confirmed it on child nodes.
action_items: (Carry-over, LOW) Two 'Maximum update depth exceeded' console errors still fire during connector interactions. Not user-visible but suggests a setState loop somewhere in the connector/selection flow — worth investigating a dependency array in a useEffect near AnnotationsLayer / SelectionPropertiesPanel.

(Carry-over, LOW) Ensure a hydration-warning test is run after the ${n}x fix in ContextMenu.jsx — not explicitly verified in this iteration but no <span>-in-<option> errors were logged in the console capture.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX 4 root cause was fixed cleanly by inlining a tiny SectionTitle helper at the top of SelectionPropertiesPanel.jsx — good, avoids cross-file coupling. Consider adding a minimal Jest/RTL snapshot that mounts the panel with a connector annotation to prevent regression.

Repeated 'Maximum update depth exceeded' warnings still seen once the connector panel is active — may indicate a stale-closure or missing memoisation in the onSetConnector callback or in AnnotationsLayer's selection sync effect.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (FIX 4 and FIX 2 both verified green; all regression smoke checks pass)

context_for_next_testing_agent: FIX 4 is fully green — SelectionPropertiesPanel renders with local SectionTitle, all studio-conn-* testids exist in DOM (confirmed by evaluate-dump: studio-selection-panel, studio-conn-color-{00f0ff,8a5bff,ff6ad5,ffb547,3ddc84,cfe0ff}, studio-conn-width-{1,1.6,2.5,4}, studio-conn-arrow-{on,off}). Important test-flow note: after clicking a colour/width button, the connector selection can be lost if you immediately re-click the canvas — query the testids BEFORE simulating other canvas clicks. FIX 2 works once the consent popup is dismissed (Decline button) — a new annotation with testid pattern mm-annot-shape-annot_<ts>_<id> is created. If retesting mm-ctx-add-count, use a non-root node (root 'Map Title' shows a simplified ctx menu without the count selector).
rca of the issue: Iter_53 CRITICAL FAIL RCA: SelectionPropertiesPanel.jsx used <SectionTitle> inside the isConnector branch without declaring/importing the component, throwing ReferenceError at runtime whenever a connector annotation was selected. Fix: lines 8-12 now define a local SectionTitle functional component inside the same file, removing the undefined reference. Verified by console capture (zero pageerror entries related to SectionTitle) and by DOM inspection showing all connector-inspector testids rendered.
